name: body-map-selector
title: Body Map Selector
description: Front/back body diagram to mark pain or symptom locations, keyboard-accessible.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires when a region is toggled.

clinicalNotes: Every region is a real button with a text label (aria-label + title) and is reachable by keyboard — a mouse-only body map excludes keyboard and assistive-tech users and is unusable on a shared kiosk. Laterality is the patient's own, not the viewer's: on the front, patient-right sits on the viewer's left; on the back it sits on the viewer's right, and the region coordinates mirror accordingly. A text summary of marked regions is shown and each can be removed without using the diagram.
notes: Round-2 form component; SVG silhouette with overlaid labelled region buttons + toggle-group (front/back) + badge summary + tooltip. Each region shows its label in a tooltip on hover/focus (aria-label as the SR fallback). Intensity per region can be layered by callers on top of the id set.
